acquisition method: We have used shotgun proteomics to identify proteins...
alkylation reagent: 5 μl 375 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) was mixed into each sample...
alkylation concentration: 5 μl 375 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) was mixed into each sample...
cleavage agent: 1 µg trypsin (Catalogue # V511; Promega, Madison, WI): 5 µg sample protein...
instrument: peptides were analyzed using LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer...
labeling: we employed TMT-labeling of proteins expressed by animals fed an iron-controlled diets...
